name: Nigerian Peanut Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 packets instant chicken broth and seasoning mix
1 1/2 small dried green chili peppers, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, dissolve the broth mix in water.
2. Add the finely chopped dried green chili peppers and bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Stir in the diced green bell pepper and onion, then return to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and cover. Let simmer until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Reduce heat to the lowest possible temperature. Add the peanut butter and stir constantly until it is melted and the mixture is well blended.
6. Makes 2 servings.
